chunks.summary: User asks if it's better than mempalace. Assistant requests clarification on mempalace's function for accurate comparison. No decisions or code changes made.
Decisions: Compare MCP approaches. Code changes: None specified. Topics: Storage, retrieval, history, knowledge graph. Problems: Lossy vs. lossless storage, search efficiency.
Decided to keep project-specific setup. No changes to code. Discussed MemPalace overhead vs. current setup benefits: scoped design, no retrieval needed, fits context.
Mem feature final check complete. Memory updated, audit done. Files `.mcp_memory.json` & `.mcp_history.json` confirmed. Session hooks in `settings.local.json` verified. Ready for new features.

Repo: claude-spellbook. 23 skills, 12 cmds, 5 agents for Claude Code. Automates audits, PRs, deps, onboarding. Cast spells wisely! 🧙 #dev #automation
Decisions: Integrate memory_map for persistent memory. Code changes: Revised options for MCP server. Topics: Memory integration, user experience. Problems solved: Reduces need for re-explanation.
Image input supported via direct upload or file path (e.g., C:\Users\Sidhartha\screenshot.png). Formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP.
Discussed input methods in cmd: drag & drop images or use file path. Clipboard paste not supported. No code changes or decisions made.
